data.title: Lusha Tutorial: Find Verified B2B Contacts in Minutes
data.excerpt: Step-by-step Lusha tutorial to find verified emails and phone numbers from LinkedIn. Start prospecting smarter with this B2B data platform.

$media.alt: Lusha Tutorial: Find Verified B2B Contacts in Minutes

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through them, I may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.*
Why I Started Using Lusha for Prospecting
I used to spend hours hunting for decision-maker contact info. Copy-pasting names into search bars. Guessing email patterns. Getting bounced messages. Sound familiar?

Then a colleague showed me Lusha. Within ten minutes, I had verified emails and direct phone numbers for five prospects I'd been chasing for weeks. Not guesses—verified data pulled straight from LinkedIn profiles.
That moment changed how I approach outreach entirely. If you want to skip the guesswork and start connecting with real people,
sign up for Lusha's free plan

Lusha is a B2B data platform that gives you verified emails, direct dials, and company information right where you work—on LinkedIn, in your CRM, or through their web app. It's trusted by over 1 million sales professionals worldwide. You can learn more about
what Lusha is and how it works
Getting started takes less than two minutes.
No credit card required. The free plan gives you
—enough to test the waters and see real results immediately.
Each credit equals one contact lookup. So 40 credits means 40 verified email addresses or phone numbers every month, completely free.
This is where Lusha becomes incredibly powerful.
1. After signing up, you'll see a prompt to install the Lusha extension
3. Pin the extension to your toolbar for easy access
4. Log in with your Lusha credentials

Now visit any LinkedIn profile. You'll notice a Lusha sidebar or button appear. One click reveals the person's verified work email, direct phone number, and company details. No switching tabs. No manual searching.
The extension works on LinkedIn profiles, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company pages. It integrates seamlessly without slowing down your browsing.

This means Lusha is evolving from a data tool into a complete outreach platform. You find the contacts, enrich the data, and reach out—all in one place. Discover the
Key Features That Set Lusha Apart
These are the capabilities I use most and why I recommend Lusha over alternatives:
— Not all email finders are equal. Lusha shows you how confident they are in each email, so you know what to expect. I rarely see bounces on high-confidence emails.
— Many tools give you company switchboard numbers. Lusha provides actual direct dials for decision-makers. This alone has doubled my connect rates.
— On Starter and above, Lusha shows which companies are actively looking for solutions in your category. You can prioritize outreach to warm prospects instead of cold ones.
— Found a great customer? Lusha suggests similar contacts and companies. It's like having a prospecting assistant who learns your ideal customer profile.
— For technical teams, the API lets you pull Lusha data into any custom workflow, app, or internal tool. Pro plans include this.
— Upload a list, get enriched data back. Perfect for cleaning up old databases or enriching event attendee lists.
Want to see how Lusha stacks up against other tools? Here's
Ready to find your first verified contacts? Create a free Lusha account today
— The free and Starter plans are perfect for individual contributors who need reliable contact data without enterprise pricing. If you're booking meetings, Lusha pays for itself in the first week.
— The Pro plan includes multiple seats, shared lists, and API access. Great for teams that want consistent data quality across the board.
— The Premium plan scales to 5+ seats with 40,800+ credits per year. Built for teams doing serious outbound volume.
— Finding candidates? Lusha works for talent acquisition too. Get direct contact info for passive candidates you find on LinkedIn.
— Need to enrich lead lists from webinars, events, or content downloads? The CSV enrichment feature handles this beautifully.
— If you're a startup founder wearing the sales hat, the free plan gives you everything you need to start building your pipeline.
to see how different teams leverage it.
Lusha Pricing: What Each Plan Includes
Lusha keeps pricing straightforward with four tiers:
Everything in Free plus: lookalikes, bulk enrichment, AI assistant, buying intent
Everything in Starter plus: API, CSV enrichment, signals, webhooks
Everything in Pro plus: priority support, advanced integrations
All paid plans save 25% with annual billing. I recommend starting with the free plan to validate the data quality for your specific market, then upgrading once you see results.
If you're curious how this compares to tools like Apollo.io, check out our
My Honest Take After Using Lusha Daily
I've tested a lot of B2B data tools. Here's what makes Lusha stick:
— The Chrome extension is instant. No loading screens, no waiting. Click, reveal, move on.
— The verified data is genuinely reliable. I track my bounce rates, and Lusha-sourced emails consistently outperform other sources.
— No complicated setup. No week-long onboarding. Install the extension, start finding contacts.
— This is Lusha's sweet spot. Because it lives inside LinkedIn, your workflow stays natural. You're already prospecting there—Lusha just makes it 10x faster.
— The team ships new features regularly. Buying intent, AI insights, and sequences all launched recently. The product keeps getting better.
The free plan alone has generated real pipeline for me. When I upgraded to Starter, the buying intent feature helped me prioritize my outreach and close deals faster.
You've seen the steps. You know the features. Now it's time to try it yourself.
The free plan has zero risk—no credit card, no commitment, 40 credits every month. Install the extension, find ten prospects you've been wanting to reach, and see the data quality firsthand.
I'm confident you'll see results fast. Lusha has become one of those tools I open every single workday without thinking about it.
Start your free Lusha account and find verified contacts in minutes
How accurate is Lusha's contact data?

Lusha maintains high accuracy rates by continuously verifying its database. Emails come with confidence scores, and I've found that scores above 90% almost never bounce. The platform sources data ethically from community contributions and public sources.
Can I use Lusha for free?
Yes. Lusha offers a permanent free plan with 40 credits per month and one seat. No credit card required. It's enough to test the tool and get real value before committing to a paid plan.
Does Lusha work with LinkedIn Sales Navigator?
Absolutely. The Chrome extension works on regular LinkedIn, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company pages. The experience is seamless across all LinkedIn interfaces.
